top_shared_pathways: Constitutive Signaling by AKT1 E17K in Cancer
Energy dependent regulation of mTOR by LKB1-AMPK
evidence.bbb_experimental_evidence: FDA-approved for TSC-associated SEGA and partial-onset seizures (CNS indications). CSF penetration documented. Reference: Franz et al., 2013.

top_shared_pathways: Constitutive Signaling by AKT1 E17K in Cancer
Energy dependent regulation of mTOR by LKB1-AMPK
evidence.bbb_experimental_evidence: Preclinical CNS efficacy in SYNGAP1, TSC, and NF1 mouse models. CNS exposure sufficient for mTOR inhibition at systemic doses. Reference: Bhatt et al., 2020.

drugs.moa: Dual specificity mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase; MEK1/2 inhibitor

top_shared_pathways: Energy dependent regulation of mTOR by LKB1-AMPK
evidence.bbb_experimental_evidence: FDA-approved for NF1 plexiform neurofibromas (pediatric >= 2 years). Active trials for NF1 optic pathway gliomas confirm CNS penetration. Reference: Dombi et al., 2016.
Lipophilic statin with documented CNS penetration. Cognitive effects studied in NF1. Reference: Krab et al., 2008.
Anesthetic/CNS drug with primary CNS target.
